name: hailmary
description: Structured browser automation framework. Use these tools to interact with websites deterministically.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Log into a website using saved cookies. Provides a logged-in session ready to browse.

cookieFile.description: Path to cookie JSON file (defaults to built-in paths)

url.description: URL to navigate to after login (defaults to site's home page)

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Go to a URL. Use this first to load any website.

url.description: The full URL to navigate to (e.g., https://www.facebook.com/messages)

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click on an element. Use text to click on something containing that text, or selector for CSS selector.

text.description: Text contained in the element to click (e.g., 'Send Message' or 'Ray')

index.description: Index of element to click if multiple matches (0 = first)

tools.name: type
tools.description: Type text into an input field.

selector.description: CSS selector for the input field (e.g., 'input[type="text"]', '#message')

pressEnter.description: Whether to press Enter after typing

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page.

fullPage.description: Whether to capture the full scrollable page

tools.name: getText
tools.description: Get text content from the page or specific elements.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to get text from specific elements

tools.name: getUrl
tools.description: Get the current URL of the page.

milliseconds.description: How long to wait in milliseconds

tools.name: marketplaceSearch
tools.description: Search Facebook Marketplace with filters. Automatically logs in, navigates to marketplace, types the query, and returns structured results.

category.description: Category to search in. Defaults to all categories.

location.description: Location to search in (e.g., 'San Jose, CA'). Defaults to your saved location.

tools.name: analyzeProduct
tools.description: Go to a Facebook Marketplace product URL and analyze it. Extracts title, price, location, condition, description, seller info, and optionally captures gallery screenshots.

url.description: REQUIRED. The Facebook Marketplace item URL (e.g., https://www.facebook.com/marketplace/item/123456/)

tools.name: enterPin
tools.description: Enter PIN code into Facebook's encrypted chat PIN dialog. Automatically detects the dialog, focuses the input, types the PIN (120106), and presses Enter.

pin.description: The PIN code to enter (defaults to 120106)
